ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/MiroFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish
Language: python
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Datalux/Osintgram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Datalux/Osintgram
Language: python
Osintgram is a OSINT tool on Instagram. It offers an interactive shell to perform analysis on Instagram account of any users by its nickname

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
Language: python
FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBB-finance/OpenBB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBB-finance/OpenBB
Language: python
Financial data platform for analysts, quants and AI agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
Language: python
Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

ns0:entry.ns0:title: donnemartin/system-design-primer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/donnemartin/system-design-primer
Language: python
Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freqtrade/freqtrade-strategies
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freqtrade/freqtrade-strategies
Language: python
Free trading strategies for Freqtrade bot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
Language: python
AI Agent Governance Toolkit — Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, execution sandboxing, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents. Covers 10/10 OWASP Agentic Top 10.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
Language: python
754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
Language: python
A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
Language: python
Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sansan0/TrendRadar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sansan0/TrendRadar
Language: python
⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 + RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 + AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shiyu-coder/Kronos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shiyu-coder/Kronos
Language: python
Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

ns0:entry.ns0:title: st-tech/ppf-contact-solver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/st-tech/ppf-contact-solver
Language: python
A contact solver for physics-based simulations involving 👚 shells, 🪵 solids and 🪢 rods.
